info.title: Stripe Sync Service
info.description:
Stripe Sync Service — manage pipelines and webhook ingress.

## Endpoints

| Method | Path | Summary |
|--------|------|---------|
| GET | /health | Health check |
| GET | /pipelines | List pipelines |
| POST | /pipelines | Create pipeline |
| GET | /pipelines/{id} | Retrieve pipeline |
| PATCH | /pipelines/{id} | Update pipeline |
| DELETE | /pipelines/{id} | Delete pipeline |
| POST | /pipelines/{id}/pause | Pause pipeline |
| POST | /pipelines/{id}/resume | Resume pipeline |
| POST | /webhooks/{pipeline_id} | Ingest a Stripe webhook event |

account_id.description: Stripe account ID (resolved from API if omitted)

livemode.description: Whether this is a live mode sync

base_url.description: Override the Stripe API base URL (e.g. http://localhost:12111 for stripe-mock)

webhook_url.description: URL for managed webhook endpoint registration

webhook_secret.description: Webhook signing secret (whsec_...) for signature verification

websocket.description: Enable WebSocket streaming for live events

poll_events.description: Enable events API polling for incremental sync after backfill

webhook_port.description: Port for built-in webhook HTTP listener (e.g. 4242)

revalidate_objects.description: Object types to re-fetch from Stripe API on webhook (e.g. ["subscription"])

backfill_limit.description: Max objects to backfill per stream (useful for testing)

rate_limit.description: Max Stripe API requests per second (default: 25)

backfill_concurrency.description: Number of time-range segments for parallel backfill (default: 200)

ssl_ca_pem.description: PEM-encoded CA certificate for SSL verification (required for verify-ca / verify-full with a private CA)

spreadsheet_title.description: Title when creating a new spreadsheet

batch_size.description: Rows per Sheets API append call

streams.description: Selected streams to sync. All streams synced if omitted.

sync_mode.description: How the source reads this stream. Defaults to full_refresh.

backfill_limit.description: Cap backfill to this many records, then mark the stream complete.

status.description: Live workflow status. Absent if no workflow is running for this pipeline.

paused.description: Whether the pipeline is currently paused.

iteration.description: Number of times this workflow has continued-as-new.

post.description: Receives a raw Stripe webhook event, verifies its signature using the pipeline's webhook secret, and enqueues it for processing by the active pipeline.
